creator: giles@nemeton.com.au
text:
Make world is lacking some glue for /usr/share/dict/eign.

Fix: 

'make world' should use 'eign' from the src tree or install it earlier.
(If make world is supported for systems without everything installed
first.)
How-To-Repeat: 	
Try 'make world' on a system with only the 'bin' distribution installed.
